title: 4Pcs Artificial Velvet Magnolia Flower Stems Glitter Tip Poinsettia Picks for Wedding Christmas Tree Decorations (Champagne)
features: Elegant Floral Accents: Enhance your home décor with these 4 artificial velvet magnolia flower stems, featuring glittering tips that add a touch of glamour.
Versatile Design: These poinsettia picks are perfect for adorning wreaths, garlands, Christmas trees, centrepieces, and other floral arrangements.
Long-Lasting Beauty: Crafted from high-quality velvet material, these faux flowers retain their vibrant colours and lush appearance for years.

Convenient Size: Each stem measures approximately 30 cm in length, the diameter of the flower head is about 15cm-20cm (depending on the size you open it). allowing for easy incorporation into various decorative displays.
Hassle-Free Maintenance: Unlike fresh flowers, these artificial blooms require no watering or special care, making them an effortless way to brighten up any space.
description: Elevate your home decor with these exquisite 4Pcs Artificial Velvet Magnolia Flower Stems Glitter Tip Poinsettia Picks. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, these artificial flowers boast velvety petals and shimmering glitter tips, adding a touch of elegance to any space. Perfect for adorning your Christmas tree or creating stunning centrepieces for weddings and special occasions. Effortlessly blend these versatile picks into your existing decor, creating a warm and inviting ambience. With their long-lasting beauty and low maintenance, these artificial flowers are an excellent choice for those seeking a hassle-free way to infuse their surroundings with natural charm. Embrace the captivating allure of these 4Pcs Artificial Velvet Magnolia Flower Stems Glitter Tip Poinsettia Picks and elevate your home's aesthetic to new heights.
